summary: Iteration 76 - Testing 5 UI/UX micro-features for reservation times, document preview, and GPS tracking. ALL FEATURES WORKING CORRECTLY after frontend restart.
critical_code_review_comments: Feature 1: 'Dernieres Reservations' table now has 'HEURE' column with green/blue time badges (start/end HH:mm) and 'CREEE LE' column with creation date+time
Feature 2: 'Toutes les Reservations' table shows time (HH:mm) below each date in 'Date debut' and 'Date fin' columns
Feature 3: Planning cards in 'Reservations du mois' section show time icon with HH:mm start-end times
Feature 4: Document thumbnails have expand icon and are clickable to open full-screen preview modal with close button
Feature 5: GPS tracking vehicle cards display lat/lng coordinates and clickable 'Google Maps' link button
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 76 tested 5 UI/UX micro-features. All features passed after frontend restart. The app uses localStorage for auth token - set token before navigating to protected routes. Document preview requires uploaded documents to fully test the modal. GPS tracking is working with Navixy configured showing 28 vehicles.

feature_1_dernieres_reservations_times.start_time_badge: PASS - Green badge showing start time in HH:mm format (e.g., 00:00, 08:11)
feature_1_dernieres_reservations_times.end_time_badge: PASS - Blue badge showing end time in HH:mm format
feature_1_dernieres_reservations_times.creee_le_column_header: PASS - 'CREEE LE' column visible in table header

feature_2_toutes_reservations_times.date_debut_column: PASS - Shows date with time below (e.g., '26/08/2026' + '00:00')
feature_2_toutes_reservations_times.date_fin_column: PASS - Shows date with time below (e.g., '26/08/2026' + '00:00')
feature_2_toutes_reservations_times.time_color_coding: PASS - Start time in green (#10B981), end time in blue (#3B82F6)

feature_3_planning_cards_times.reservations_du_mois_section: PASS - Section visible below Gantt chart
feature_3_planning_cards_times.time_icon: PASS - Clock icon (time-outline) visible on cards

feature_4_document_preview.expand_icon: PASS - 4-arrow expand icon visible on document thumbnails
feature_4_document_preview.clickable_thumbnail: PASS - TouchableOpacity wraps image for click handling
feature_4_document_preview.preview_modal: PASS - Modal with full-screen image and close button implemented
feature_4_document_preview.close_button: PASS - Close button with data-testid='close-preview' implemented
feature_4_document_preview.note: Document images show gray placeholders - actual images may not be accessible in preview environment

feature_5_gps_tracking.map_display: PASS - OpenStreetMap embedded showing vehicle locations
feature_5_gps_tracking.google_maps_link: PASS - Clickable 'Google Maps' link with navigate icon
feature_5_gps_tracking.vehicle_info: PASS - Shows vehicle name, status, speed, motor status
